description: Real EC P-256 self-signed TLS leaf certificate and its golden RFC 7469 SPKI pin (ADR-031 D2/D8/D9). Proves the child SpkiBinding.spkiSha256 and the parent SpkiBindingVerifier.spkiSha256 both compute base64url-no-pad(SHA-256(DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo)) identically over a REAL X.509 leaf (not opaque bytes) — the cert-substitution defense (D2 check 3) binds the assertion against exactly this value, extracted from the negotiated handshake leaf.
